question: Which of the following statements about the HIPAA Security Rule are true?
canonical_answer:
All of the above (answer)

a). Established a national set of standards for the protection of PHI that is created, received, maintained, or transmitted in electronic media by a HIPAA covered entity (CE) or business associate (BA)

b). Protects electronic PHI (ePHI)

c). Addresses three types of safeguards - administrative, technical and physical - that must be in place to secure individuals' ePHI

appears_in.title: Army Hippa
appears_in.answer: All of the above

appears_in.title: Army Hippa Training

appears_in.title: Hipaa Includes The Minimum Necessary Standard
appears_in.answer:
All of the above

The HIPAA Security Rule: Established a national set of standards for the protection of PHI that is created, received, maintained, or transmitted in electronic media by a HIPAA CE or BA; protects ePHI; and addresses three types of safeguards - administrative, technical and physical - that must be in place to secure individuals' ePHI.
